Product Overview - Gamma Prompt

Gamma.app prompt for generating the HeyZack product overview deck

Gamma.app Prompt: HeyZack Product Overview Deck

Presentation Brief

Create a 10-slide product overview deck for HeyZack, showcasing the complete smart home ecosystem of 128 products across 15 categories.

Audience: Potential customers, partners, distributors Tone: Professional, informative, comprehensive Style: Clean, product-focused, modern tech

Theme & Styling

Color Palette:

  • Primary: #243984 (deep blue)
  • Accent: #E82F89 (vibrant pink)
  • Background: #FFFFFF and #F8FAFC alternating
  • Text: #2E2D2C (near black)

Typography:

  • Headlines: Bold sans-serif
  • Body: Clean, readable

Visual Style:

  • Clean product photography
  • White backgrounds for products
  • Minimal, organized layouts
  • Category-based organization

Slide Content

Slide 1: Title

HeyZack Product Ecosystem 128 Products. 15 Categories. One Platform.

Gradient background with logo

Slide 2: Philosophy

Complete Control. One System.

Every device designed to work together:

  • Interoperability — All devices communicate
  • Simplicity — One app, one setup
  • Intelligence — AI optimization built-in

Visual: Product ecosystem overview

Slide 3: Overview

The Complete Ecosystem

CategoryProducts
Climate Control14
Security19
Energy12
Lighting18
Access13
Sensors13
Curtains29
Gateways4

Total: 128 Products

Slide 4: Climate

Climate Control — 14 Products

Featured:

  • Smart Thermostat
  • Radiator Valve
  • IR Remote
  • Temperature Sensor

Benefit: 20-30% energy savings

Slide 5: Security

Security — 19 Products

Featured:

  • Video Doorbell
  • Indoor Camera
  • Outdoor Camera
  • Motion Sensor

Benefit: 24/7 monitoring ready

Slide 6: Energy

Energy Management — 12 Products

Featured:

  • Smart Breaker
  • Energy Monitor
  • Smart Plug
  • Load Controller

Benefit: Real-time tracking

Slide 7: Lighting

Lighting — 18 Products

Featured:

  • Smart Dimmer
  • LED Driver
  • RGB Controller
  • Scene Switch

Benefit: Voice & app control

Slide 8: More Categories

Additional Categories

CategoryProducts
Access Control13
Sensors13
Curtains & Shades29
Gateways4

Slide 9: Connectivity

Universal Connectivity

Protocols:

  • Zigbee 3.0 (primary)
  • WiFi (select devices)
  • Matter (future ready)

Apps: iOS, Android, Voice assistants

Slide 10: CTA

Build Your Smart Space

Contact us for catalogs and pricing:

  • sales@heyzack.ai
  • heyzack.ai/products

Gradient background

Generation Settings

  • Layout: Clean grids, product-focused
  • Images: Generate product-style imagery
  • Charts: Simple category counts
